name: Absorb LMS API
what_it_does: Absorb LMS REST API for corporate learning management, training administration, compliance certification, and workforce development. Enables AI agents to manage learner enrollment and course assignment for automated training onboarding workflows, handle course completion tracking and certificate management for compliance training automation, access learning path and curriculum management for structured development program automation, retrieve training analytics and completion reporting for L&D business intelligence, manage instructor-led training (ILT) session scheduling and registration for blended learning automation, handle compliance certification tracking and renewal automation for regulatory training management, access content library management for SCORM/xAPI course deployment automation, retrieve assessment and quiz result management for training effectiveness measurement, manage department and organizational hierarchy for role-based training assignment, and integrate Absorb LMS with HRIS (Workday, ADP, BambooHR), SSO providers (Okta, Azure AD), and content providers (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera).
use_cases: Onboarding new hires from HR automation agents
Tracking compliance training from regulatory agents
Managing certification renewals from workforce compliance agents
Reporting L&D metrics from training analytics agents
not_for: K-12 and higher education (use Canvas or Moodle)
Customer education platform (use Northpass or Gainsight PX)
Microlearning and just-in-time content (use EdCast or Degreed)
best_when: A mid-market to enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate employee training enrollment, compliance certification tracking, learning path assignment, ILT scheduling, and training analytics within Absorb LMS as the corporate learning system of record.
avoid_when: HIPAA TRAINING RECORD ACCURACY FOR HEALTHCARE COMPLIANCE: Automated compliance training completion records in Absorb for HIPAA workforce training must accurately reflect individual employee completion with date, version, and acknowledgment; automated HIPAA training reporting without individual acknowledgment record creates OCR audit finding. OSHA TRAINING CERTIFICATION VALIDITY: Automated OSHA compliance training completion tracking in Absorb must track certification expiration and renewal dates; automated worker assignment to regulated tasks without verifying current OSHA certification creates OSHA violation. GDPR EMPLOYEE LEARNING DATA: Automated processing of EU employee learning data in Absorb must comply with GDPR Article 88 employment data provisions; automated retention of learning records beyond legitimate purpose creates GDPR violation. SCORM/XAPI CONTENT VERSION MANAGEMENT: Automated course deployment via Absorb API must track SCORM/xAPI content package versions; automated deployment of outdated course version for compliance training creates compliance record inaccuracy for regulated training requirements.

auth.notes: Absorb LMS uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Calgary, Alberta HQ. Founded 2002. Private (Silversmith Capital Partners and Buckley Capital investors). 1,500+ enterprise customers globally. Corporate training LMS with AI-powered features. SCORM, xAPI (Tin Can), AICC content standard support. SSO integration with Okta, Azure AD, Google. Competes with Docebo, TalentLMS, and Cornerstone for corporate LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-learner annual subscription with enterprise volume tiers
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per active learner or named user; Create (content authoring) add-on; professional services
pricing.notes: Calgary AB. Private, Silversmith Capital investors. Founded 2002. 1,500+ enterprise customers. Per-learner annual subscription. Absorb Create content authoring add-on.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; course completion and reporting API throttled; webhooks for enrollment events

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE TRAINING COMPLETION ACKNOWLEDGMENT INTEGRITY: Automated compliance training completion records must capture individual learner acknowledgment (e-signature or confirmation click) with timestamp and course version; automated completion marking without learner acknowledgment creates unenforceable HIPAA/OSHA training record

SCORM/XAPI CONTENT VERSION PINNING: Automated course deployment via Absorb API must track SCORM/xAPI package version deployed for each compliance training completion; automated training record without content version reference creates audit finding when content is updated mid-compliance-cycle

HRIS SYNC DEPROVISIONING LATENCY: Automated HRIS-to-Absorb user sync for terminated employees must immediately deactivate Absorb learner access; sync delay of hours can create access window for terminated employees; implement real-time deactivation separate from batch HRIS sync for off-boarding

ILT session capacity and waitlist management — automated ILT session registration via Absorb must enforce session capacity limits; automated over-enrollment beyond room or instructor capacity creates training delivery failure; implement waitlist management for full sessions before automated enrollment confirmation

Certification expiration automation and re-enrollment — automated certification renewal reminder and re-enrollment triggers from Absorb certification expiry data must account for course completion time before expiration; automated re-enrollment 14 days before expiry may be insufficient for multi-week compliance courses

Reporting API pagination for large datasets — Absorb training completion reports for large enterprise organizations (10,000+ learners) require cursor-based pagination; automated compliance reports must implement full pagination loop; incomplete pagination creates compliance gap reports with missing completion records
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/CA/AU. Employee learning and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/CA/AU. Employee learning and training record data.
